originalTitle: THROUGH THE CRACKS // Summit Official Map Reveal Trailer - VALORANT
content: Find the beauty within the battlefield on Summit, the Radiant training facility nestled high in the mountains of China. Summit launch with Season 26: ACT IV. Visuals created in partnership with Brunch Studios — Music: 没咯“Mei Lo” by DOUDOU Additional Composition: The Crystal Creative, Mersh Kovathen Music Supervision: Riot Games Music Team — Play VALORANT: https://riot.com/3idlntG Follow us: Twitter: https://riot.com/2HIv1s1 Instagram: https://riot.com/2S8uTnm TikTok: https://riot.com/3FwNKSE #VALORANT #RIOTGAMES #SUMMIT
chineseTitle: | 穿 | 越 | 裂 | 缝 | | / | / | | 峰 | 会 | 官 | 方 | 地 | 图 | 揭 | 晓 | 预 | 告 | 片 | | - | | V | A | L | O | R | A | N | T |
chineseContent: 在 Summit 上寻找战场之美，这是坐落在中国高山上的 Radiant 训练设施。峰会推出第 26 季：第四幕。与 Brunch Studios 合作制作的视觉效果 — 音乐：DOUDOU 的《没咯“Mei Lo”》 附加作曲：The Crystal Creative、Mersh Kovathen 音乐监督：Riot Games 音乐团队 — Play VALORANT：https://riot.com/3idlntG 关注我们：Twitter：https://riot.com/2HIv1s1 Instagram：https://riot.com/2S8uTnm TikTok：https://riot.com/3FwNKSE #VALORANT #RIOTGAMES #峰会
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 YouTube 热门视频信号，适合用于观察大众注意力、内容叙事、传播主题和跨平台选题机会。
